/usr/sbin/ar qc libminidb_lib.a CMakeFiles/minidb_lib.dir/src/common/database.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minidb_lib.dir/src/execution/executor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minidb_lib.dir/src/index/b_plus_tree.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minidb_lib.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minidb_lib.dir/src/storage/buffer_pool_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minidb_lib.dir/src/storage/disk_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minidb_lib.dir/src/storage/lru_replacer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minidb_lib.dir/src/storage/schema.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minidb_lib.dir/src/storage/table_heap.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minidb_lib.dir/src/storage/tuple.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minidb_lib.dir/src/transaction/transaction.cpp.o
/usr/sbin/ranlib libminidb_lib.a
